title: Korean Style Fried Rice Bowl
description: A delicious and easy Korean-inspired fried rice bowl recipe made with mildly spicy Gochujang, crispy vegetables, and a fried egg.
instructions: Prepare the ingredients by chopping the veggies and cooking the rice.
Heat sesame oil in a pan and sauté the chopped veggies until tender.
Push the veggies aside and make a small well in the center of the pan.
Crack the eggs into the well and scramble them, breaking them up into small pieces.
Mix the eggs with the veggies and stir in the Gochujang, soy sauce, and sesame seeds.
Stir in the cooked rice and let it cook for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Taste and adjust the seasoning with salt, pepper, and additional Gochujang if desired.
Transfer the fried rice mixture to a bowl and garnish with additional sesame seeds and green onions if desired.
Serve the Korean style fried rice bowl hot, with a fried egg on top.
